prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Hearts of Wulin / Jianghu inspired wuxia ink-wash atlas for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent in the martial world, surrounded by misty seas, with mist-covered mountain peaks, bamboo forest valleys, ancient temple complexes, river market towns, hidden sect strongholds, imperial roads, forbidden manual caves, wandering hero routes, sacred waterfalls and secluded sword schools.
Style/medium: high-resolution Chinese ink wash continent map, classical painting style, wuxia aesthetic, flowing chi energy trails, soft mineral colors, calligraphic brush textures, elegant jianghu atmosphere.
Composition/framing: tall portrait atlas view, single continent fills most of the vertical frame with surrounding blank-mist seas and small offshore fragments; include subtle compass seal, brushwork border, river routes, temple icons, sect markers and mountain pass symbols without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, capes, deltas, misty estuaries and varied landforms; include snowy sacred peaks, temperate riverlands, bamboo forests, deserts, wetlands, lake basins, tea terraces, karst mountains and remote spiritual wastelands.
Avoid: modern satellite image, western medieval fantasy, bright game UI, simple oval continent, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
